Products

Structured by Transfer and Terminal Function

Products are grouped into marine fluid transfer, land fluid transfer, safe mooring systems and berthing aid systems, so buyers can scan by application instead of mixed product names.

View All Product Columns
01

Marine Fluid Transfer

Ship-to-shore fluid transfer equipment for crude oil, chemical, LNG and LPG terminals with controlled motion envelope and safer vessel interface design.

Marine Loading Arms Jetty Gangways
Explore Solutions ->
ERS & QC/DC focused flagship product Marine access and terminal walkway systems
02

Land Fluid Transfer

Depot and terminal loading equipment for truck, railcar and skid-mounted transfer systems with vapor recovery and metering-ready layouts.

Truck & Railcar Loading Arms Integrated Loading Skids
Explore Solutions ->
Top / bottom loading and vapor recovery System integration and packaged loading modules
03

Safe Mooring Systems

Safety-critical mooring hardware and monitoring systems designed for controlled release, real-time load visibility and hazardous-area compatibility.

Quick Release Mooring Hooks Mooring Load Monitoring System
Explore Solutions ->
Capstan and load monitoring focused Tension monitoring software and field terminals
04

Berthing Aid Systems

Laser-guided berthing and environmental monitoring systems that reduce approach risk and improve terminal control visibility.

Laser-Guided Berthing Aid
Explore Solutions ->
Laser ranging, large displays and environmental integration

Manufacturing

Real Workshop, Real Manufacturing Capability

Advanced facilities, skilled teams and strict quality control ensure every system we deliver is built to perform.

Advanced Facilities

Modern production lines and testing equipment ensure precision manufacturing.

Quality Control

Rigorous inspection and testing at every stage to meet international standards.

Engineered to Perform

Every system is designed, built and tested for long-term reliability in demanding environments.

Built to Last

Engineered for safety. Built to perform.

Hanlong

Projects

Project-Oriented Terminal References

A project section that combines real industrial imagery with application-specific text gives buyers a quicker read on where Hanlong systems are deployed.

Project 01

Oil & Gas Terminals

Marine loading arms, safe mooring systems and berth safety equipment for crude oil and refined product transfer.

Project 02

Chemical & Petrochemical

Safe and efficient handling of hazardous and specialty chemicals.

Project 03

Marine & Bulk Terminals

Engineered for diverse cargoes and demanding marine operations.
